catalog_content:
Item Name: Raven's Brew Coffee Full Bodied Coffee Full City Roast Whole Bean - Resurrection Blend 12oz
Bullet Point 1: Resurrection Blend Full City Roast Coffee – In Constant Quest Of The Supreme Bean—We’re religious over this profoundly deep and multi-nuanced libation. It is a revival of heavenly flavor and sacrament of wakefulness in a blend of some of the most blessed beans in all creation: the chosen one. Amazing no matter how it’s brewed: drip, press, espresso, cold brew and more! Ponderous, silky body of a sweet, spicy, winey symphony of divine inspiration.
Bullet Point 2: Packaged For Freshness: At Raven's Brew, we take freshness seriously. Our coffee is packaged shortly after roasting, in air-tight bags, with one-way valves that seal in the incredible aromas and flavors. Our packaging protects your coffee from the light and air, which are both major contributors to stale coffee.
Bullet Point 3: High-Quality Beans, Perfectly Roasted: We choose rare, high-quality beans from some of the world’s best coffee plantations and delicately roast them to create super smooth layers of flavor. Our process creates a strong, rich and flavorful coffee—perfectly smooth with no unpleasant acidity.
Bullet Point 4: The Art of Roasting: From the many varieties of roasting equipment available within the industry, we have selected air roasting as our method of choice. Air roasting draws in vast amounts of hot air from underneath the coffee. The hot air surrounds each bean evenly, reducing the risk of scorching the delicate green beans. This creates a noticeably cleaner, less bitter, and more vibrant taste in the cup.
Value: 12.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium positioning is reinforced by distinctive, artistic packaging and evocative branding centered on a 'chosen one' theme, suggesting exclusivity and craftsmanship. The 12oz (340g) resealable bag with air-tight one-way valves signals a focus on freshness and quality preservation, justifying a higher price point relative to standard commodity coffee. The detailed roasting process and high-quality sourcing claims further elevate its perceived value, targeting specialty coffee enthusiasts seeking depth and complexity in flavor.

Item Name: Kevala Avocado Ghee Blend - Ghee Butter - Avocado Oil - Spreadable Butter - Avocado Cooking Oil - Ghee Clarified Butter Unsalted - Cold Pressed Avocado Oil - 17.6 oz - 1.1 lb - Paleo - Casein Free - Gluten Free - Lactose Free
Bullet Point 1: Exclusive Blend: The only product on the market that combines the nourishing power of pure ghee with cold-pressed avocado oil, offering a smooth, spreadable texture that doesn’t require refrigeration.
Bullet Point 2: Nutrient-Rich & Keto-Friendly: Loaded with healthy fats, vitamins, and antioxidants from both clarified butter ghee and refined avocado oil, this product is perfect for keto, paleo, and low-carb diets, adding a boost of nutrition to every dish and works amazing as an antioxidant and it is rich in both Linoleic Acid (CLA) and Oleic Acid.
Bullet Point 3: Perfect for High-Heat Cooking: With a high smoke point, Kevala Avocado Ghee is ideal for frying, sautéing, and roasting, making it a versatile choice for everyday and gourmet meals alike. No refrigeration required as it is shelf-stable.
Bullet Point 4: Luxuriously Spreadable: Ideal for baking, sautéing, braising, and deep-frying; Use it as a spread for toast and pancakes, drizzle it on roasted vegetables, or use it to pan fry poultry, seafood, or even red meat, since it won’t burn at the higher temperatures.
Bullet Point 5: Properties: Due to warm weather Avocado Ghee may liquify, just refrigerate to solidify again. Store in a cool dark place. Solidifies below 76ºF (24ºC).
Value: 17.6
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium specialty blend combining ghee and avocado oil, marketed with high-end positioning through ‘premium,’ ‘luxuriously spreadable,’ and high-heat cooking claims. catalog_content:
Item Name: Iberia Guava Paste, 14 oz, All Natural, Vegan, Gluten Free, Halal, Kosher Guava Paste for Snacks, Cooking, Baking, 14 Ounce (Pack of 1)
Bullet Point 1: POPULAR AND TRADITIONAL: Iberia Guava Paste is a very thick, purée of Guava Fruit. It is stiff and dense, almost like a fruit leather, but still soft and easily cut with a knife
Bullet Point 2: VERSATILE USES: It is very good on top of cheese, cream cheese or cheddar: in Cuba, cheese and guava paste is a traditional way to end dinner. It can be also be used as a filling in baked goods
Bullet Point 3: HEALTHY FRUIT: Guavas are related to eucalypts. The thin skinned fruit can pucker your mouth if it is not quite ripe but it delivers vitamin C with a punch - 7 times the daily quota in a 100g serving - as well as vitamin A
Bullet Point 4: A PERFECT PARTNER FOR CHEESE: A perfect partner to cheese, Iberia Guava Paste is simply delicious served as an accompaniment to cheese platters and is easy to slice for attractive presentation
Bullet Point 5: ENDLESS POSSIBILITES: Whether enjoyed as a condiment, spread or addition to sweet and savoury recipes, Iberia Guava Paste brings the vibrant flavours of Brazil to any dish
Value: 14.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Positioned as a traditional, versatile fruit-based product with a focus on natural and specialty dietary compliance (vegan, gluten-free, halal, kosher). Packaging suggests a mid-tier premium appeal through health and cultural heritage claims, though no overt luxury indicators. Quantity (14 oz) is standard for specialty spreads, with no bundle or multipack discounts visible. Branding emphasizes authenticity and culinary versatility, likely justifying a mid-range price point.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Better with Buckwheat Rosemary & Herbs Crackers, 6-Pack - A Complete Protein, Gluten-Free Crackers, Healthy Snack Crackers, Grain-Free, Non-GMO, Sugar-Free - Pair with Cheese, Hummus & Dips Bullet Point 1: DELICIOUS & NUTRITIOUS SNACKING CRACKERS: Better With Buckwheat’s line of buckwheat based foods are a modern twist on an ancient seed, turned into a snackable and shareable cracker you’ll always want stocked in your pantry. Bullet Point 2: MADE WITH ROSEMARY & HERBS: Our delicious gluten-free crackers are made with organic rosemary, thyme, and oregano for a tasty snack that can eaten by the handful. Bullet Point 3: GLUTEN-FREE SNACKS: Crafted with buckwheat flour and all-natural ingredients, these snack crackers are a healthier snack option that is grain-free, non-GMO, low glycemic, high in fiber, and a complete protein. Bullet Point 4: A GREAT WAY TO SNACK: Add these unique gluten and grain-free crackers to a charcuterie board with cheeses, dip in your favorite jams, pair with hummus, or simply eat them on their own. Bullet Point 5: NUTRIENT DENSE SUPERFOOD: These artisanal crackers are made with the superfood seed buckwheat and other natural ingredients. They deliver the whole family a wholesome and flavor filled snack they will love. Product Description:

Better With Buckwheat Rosemary & Herbs Crackers, 6-Pack

Better With Buckwheat is the future of your pantry. With a line of snackable, shareable crackers, you’ll find yourself reaching for Better With Buckwheat again and again. Crackers can be eaten alone of paired with cheese, hummus, or dips the options are endless.

Rosemary & Herbs Ingredients: Buckwheat Flour, High Oleic Expeller Pressed Sunflower Oil, Sunflower Flour, Cassava Flour, Whole Psyllium Husk, Sea Salt, Organic Rosemary, Cream of Tartar, Baking Soda, Organic Thyme, Organic Oregano, Sea Salt Flakes.

Buckwheat is a seriously good seed. Good for your healthy, gluten-free, grain-free, low glycemic, rich in fiber, and provides a complete protein. Hear the buzz: as bee and pollinator friendly crop, just one screw of buckwheat can support a hive of bees - that’s a lot of honey. As a regenerative crop, buckwheat nourishes low-fertility soils and can survive in drought conditions.

As a baker, farmer, and cheesemaker, Karen Getz has spent a lifetime making food to share with loved ones, and now with you. The texture and flavors of Better with Buckwheat are the result of her endless iteration process. Buckwheat is beloved superfood in cuisines worldwide, notably Asia and Eastern Europe. Better with Buckwheat is a pioneer in adapting this ancient seed for American pantries.

Value: 25.5 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Positioned as a health-conscious snack with a focus on ancient superfood ingredients like buckwheat, these gluten-free and non-GMO crackers target health-oriented consumers. The 6-pack multipack format suggests affordability and convenience for bulk buyers, though the premium organic and artisanal claims may elevate perceived value. Packaging design emphasizes natural and gluten-free credentials, which could justify a mid-to-high price point despite the standard cardboard box material.
